description: A grand clubhouse designed for celebrations, gatherings, and everyday leisure
longDescription: The Rishika Builders clubhouse is the heart of community living. Spanning over 10,000 sq.ft., it features a multipurpose banquet hall for celebrations, an indoor games room with billiards and table tennis, a premium lounge with library, and a dedicated kids' activity zone. The interiors are designed with contemporary aesthetics and premium materials for a resort-like experience.

specifications.Features: Indoor games, lounge, library, kids zone

advantages: Multipurpose banquet hall for events and celebrations
Indoor games room with billiards, TT, and carrom
Premium lounge with library and reading area
Dedicated kids' activity and learning zone
Mini theatre for movie screenings
Co-working space with high-speed WiFi

description: Temperature-controlled infinity pool with spa and wellness facilities
longDescription: Enjoy resort-style living with our infinity edge swimming pool, separate kids' pool, poolside deck, and spa facilities. The pool area is designed for both fitness swimmers and leisure relaxation, with sun loungers, umbrella seating, and a poolside refreshment kiosk. The attached spa offers jacuzzi, steam, and sauna for complete rejuvenation.

specifications.Kids Pool: Separate shallow pool with water features

advantages: Temperature-controlled infinity edge swimming pool
Separate kids' pool with water play features
Poolside deck with sun loungers and umbrellas
Jacuzzi and spa for wellness and relaxation
Steam room and sauna within spa complex
Professional pool maintenance and lifeguard

description: State-of-the-art fitness center and multi-sport facilities
longDescription: Stay active and healthy with our comprehensive fitness and sports complex. The gymnasium is equipped with the latest cardio and strength training equipment from international brands. Outdoor facilities include tennis, badminton, and basketball courts, plus a multi-sport arena. The yoga and meditation studio offers a serene space for mindfulness and wellness.
advantages: Fully-equipped gymnasium with branded equipment
Outdoor tennis, badminton, and basketball courts
Yoga and meditation studio with natural light
400m jogging and cycling track
Multi-sport arena for cricket and football
Personal trainer and fitness programs available

description: Beautifully landscaped gardens, parks, and green open spaces
longDescription: Immerse yourself in nature with over 70% open and green spaces. Our projects feature themed gardens, a central landscape park, walking and cycling trails, a meditation garden with water features, and dedicated children's play areas with safe, modern equipment. Every green space is professionally maintained to provide a serene and beautiful living environment.
advantages: 70%+ open and green spaces within the development
Central landscape park with water features
Themed gardens including herb and butterfly garden
Safe children's play area with modern equipment
Walking, jogging, and cycling trails throughout
Professionally maintained green landscapes

description: Multi-tier smart security system for complete peace of mind
longDescription: Your family's safety is our priority. Our multi-tier security system includes 24/7 CCTV surveillance with cloud backup, smart access card entry, video door phone for every unit, boom barriers at entry/exit, and round-the-clock manned security at all gates. The integrated security dashboard allows management to monitor the entire premises in real-time.

specifications.Intercom: Video door phone for each unit

advantages: 24/7 HD CCTV surveillance with cloud storage
Smart card access control at all entry points
Video door phone with intercom for every unit
Boom barriers and security gates at all entries
Round-the-clock security patrol and guard service
Fire alarm and emergency response systems

description: Eco-friendly features for sustainable and responsible living
longDescription: Rishika Builders is committed to sustainable development. Our projects incorporate rainwater harvesting systems, rooftop solar panels for common area lighting, EV charging infrastructure, organic waste composting, energy-efficient fixtures, and low-VOC paints. These initiatives not only reduce the environmental footprint but also lower maintenance costs for residents.
advantages: Rainwater harvesting system for water conservation
Rooftop solar panels reducing common area costs
EV charging infrastructure in basement parking
Organic waste composting for sustainable disposal
Energy-efficient LED lighting throughout common areas
Low-VOC paints and eco-friendly construction materials
